content.question: Are statutory (vs annual-budget) funding-floor guarantees politically achievable under the projected fiscal consolidation pressures, or will compensatory funding remain contingent on annual budget cycles?
content.reduction_path: The 2027 budget bill text showing either (a) a cardinal-law funding-floor commitment or (b) temporary, deficit-contingent compensation language; ministry communications on funding-guarantee strategy; EC fiscal guidance on permissible spending commitments.
